prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流综合类高校；软科主榜2026年第25名，近年排名稳定在24-26名之                         间，属于全国顶尖高校梯队；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，涉及校园安全、学校管理及录取断档信号；2025年声誉偏负面，招生情况自2017年以来持续恶化；抖                        音热度总排名第5（高热），短视频曝光度极高，报考关注度升温；2025年投档异常文件显示厦门大学招生情况持续恶化，中九排名下降；第五轮学科评估A-及                         以上共14个：化学A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A+、统计学A+、工商管理A、应用经济学A、教育学A、生态学A等，学科实力雄厚，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算                        机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工热门专业社会热度持续偏高；本省2026年普通高考总人数110868人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算约79980人，与2025年80421人基本持平；厦门大学位于福建省，距吉林省较远，跨省报考地域偏好中性；本。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年主校区位次后移至2572名、2026年招生计划大幅缩招20%（竞争加剧）、声誉偏负面可能抑制部分报考                         意愿、抖音高热反映关注度上升等因素，以，考虑缩招效应与声誉负面信号对冲，小幅修正-50名；预测最低位次约2213名，区间1947–2479名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 2131 → 2254 → 2039 → 1973 → 2572 (main campus). From 2021 to 2024, it was basically stable between 1973 and 2254. In 2025, the main campus ranking shifted back to about 2572, moving back about 599 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative shift of about 599 places in the last two years. The 2025 baseline is about 2572. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 45 in 2021, 43 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 47 in 2024, and 50 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 40, a 20% reduction compared to 2025, a significant reduction, and competition is expected to intensify.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university. Ranked 25th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings between 24th and 26th in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving campus safety, school management, and signals of admission gaps. The 2025 reputation is somewhat negative, with enrollment conditions continuously deteriorating since 2017. Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, and increasing application attention. The 2025 abnormal admission file shows that Xiamen University's enrollment situation continues to deteriorate, with a decline in the middle-nine ranking. The fifth round of discipline evaluation has 14 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Ecology A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, which has a strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province is 110,868. Estimated at about 72% for the physics category, it is about 79,980, basically the same as the 80,421 in 2025. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province, far from Jilin Province, with neutral cross-provincial application regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the main campus ranking shifting back to 2572 in 2025, a significant 20% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (intensified competition), a negative reputation that may suppress some application willingness, and high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention, with the reduction effect and negative reputation signal offsetting each other, a small correction of -50 places is made. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2213, with a range of 1947–2479.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1947), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 popular majors such as Accounting and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 2479), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure Tier 3 as a safety net.
